name: Swing Speed
about: Swing Speed is a self-service golf training facility in Narragansett, Rhode Island, equipped with TrackMan 4 iO simulators. It focuses on enhancing golfers' mobility and strength through data-driven practice, offering detailed shot analysis over 20 actionable data points and access to over 250 world-famous courses. The venue is designed for serious practice with real-time feedback and expert coaching, and it operates on a booking basis with flexible pricing and membership options for extended access.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art TrackMan 4 iO simulators with precise club and ball tracking
Self-service facility with flexible booking and 24/7 access for top members
Data-driven practice with over 20 actionable metrics for game improvement
Coaching available with TPI-certified professionals for tailored fitness and swing drills
Variety of membership plans offering discounted rates and exclusive hours

food_and_drink.notes: No food service mentioned; BYOB not specified
No alcohol service mentioned; BYOB not specified

simulator_hardware.notes: Two bays equipped with Optically Enhanced Radar Tracking (OERT)

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you will need to bring your own golf clubs to use at the facility.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drink?
faq.answer: There is no mention of food or drink service at Swing Speed, so bringing your own may be allowed, but it is not explicitly stated.

faq.question: How long does an 18-hole round take?
faq.answer: The time for an 18-hole round is not specified, but booking is done by the hour at $55 per hour (or $44 for members).

faq.question: Is the facility kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility mentions 'skill-building games for all ages' and offers a Junior membership, making it suitable for kids and youth golfers.
